description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark brown wooden handle with a polygonal cross-section, giving it a sturdy and ergonomic grip. The handle is straight and slightly tapered, with subtle faceting along its length. The axe head is made of metallic gray steel, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade that widens toward the cutting edge and narrows at the poll. The blade has a single, slightly curved cutting edge and a flat back, suitable for splitting or chopping tasks. The head is mounted securely atop the handle, with the wood extending slightly above the blade, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting. There are no visible markings, engravings, or decorative elements on either the handle or the blade.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a dark wooden handle and a broad, metallic gray wedge-shaped blade. The design is simple, functional, and unadorned.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the left side, showing the full profile of the blade and the straight, faceted wooden handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, revealing the narrow edge of the blade and the polygonal cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: The right side of the axe is visible, displaying the opposite profile of the blade and handle, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the back, showing the flat poll of the blade and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, faceted wooden handle with a polygonal cross-section, no visible grip features, dark brown color.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped steel blade with a single slightly curved cutting edge and a flat poll, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle extending through the blade head.
